name: Stripe Tax Read
description: Read-only Stripe reporting tools for monthly tax summaries and CSV exports.
author: Synapse Forge

tools.name: stripe-tax-read.list_charges_by_date
tools.description: List Stripe charges between start_date and end_date (inclusive UTC) with pagination and normalized fields.

limit.description: Max number of charges to return (1-10000)

tools.name: stripe-tax-read.january_summary
tools.description: Generate tax-oriented January totals for a given year: gross, refunds, fees, net, and charge count.

year.description: Calendar year for January summary, e.g. 2026

tools.name: stripe-tax-read.export_month_csv
tools.description: Export Stripe charges to CSV for start_date..end_date inclusive UTC.
